css: .cls-__ID__-w{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:1080px;height:1920px;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-b{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;background:#000;border-bottom:3px solid #FF4D00;padding:35px 55px 30px;} .cls-__ID__-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:22px;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);} .cls-__ID__-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;} .cls-__ID__-num{font-family:'Space Mono','Courier New',monospace;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;color:#FF4D00;min-width:56px;} .cls-__ID__-title{font-family:'Archivo Black','Arial Black',Impact,sans-serif;font-size:82px;color:#fff;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.04em;line-height:.88;} .cls-__ID__-sub{font-family:'Space Mono','Courier New',monospace;font-size:17px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.01em;margin-top:4px;}

css: .cls-__ID__-w{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:1080px;height:1920px;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-strip{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:#000;border-top:3px solid #FF4D00;overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-row1{display:flex;white-space:nowrap;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-row2{display:flex;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-r1t{font-family:'Archivo Black','Arial Black',Impact,sans-serif;font-size:50px;color:#FF4D00;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.02em;padding:14px 0;white-space:nowrap;animation:cls-__ID__-mq 5s linear infinite;} .cls-__ID__-r2t{font-family:'Space Mono','Courier New',monospace;font-size:20px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);text-transform:uppercase;padding:10px 0;white-space:nowrap;animation:cls-__ID__-mq-r 9s linear infinite;} @keyframes cls-__ID__-mq{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}} @keyframes cls-__ID__-mq-r{from{transform:translateX(-50%)}to{transform:translateX(0)}}
